summary.overall_health: FAIR - Architecture and testing need significant improvements

issues.description: Project structure does not follow feature-first architecture. Currently using flat structure with src/screens, src/components, src/store instead of recommended src/features/[feature-name]/ organization with feature-scoped components, screens, hooks, and services.
issues.recommendation: Refactor to feature-first architecture: Create src/features/{auth, products, orders, cart}/ directories with nested structure (screens/, components/, hooks/, services/, store/, types/). Move shared components to src/components/ui/ or src/components/shared/.

issues.description: Missing barrel exports (index.ts) in feature directories. This breaks the feature-first pattern and makes imports verbose.
issues.recommendation: Create index.ts files in each feature directory that export all public APIs from that feature.

issues.description: HomeScreen renderProduct function is not memoized. This function is passed as renderItem to FlatList, causing unnecessary re-renders of all products when parent state changes.
issues.recommendation: Wrap renderProduct with useCallback and memoize the component passed to FlatList. Add React.memo wrapper with custom comparison if needed.

issues.description: FlatList missing keyExtractor. Currently relies on default index-based key, which is inefficient for list updates and can cause rendering bugs.
issues.recommendation: Add keyExtractor={(item) => String(item.id)} to FlatList configuration.

issues.description: FlatList missing getItemLayout optimization. Large product lists will have poor scroll performance and jank.
issues.recommendation: Add getItemLayout prop with estimated item height for virtualization optimization, or use numColumns to reduce visible items.

issues.description: CartScreen renderItem is not memoized. This causes all cart items to re-render even when only one item quantity changes.
issues.recommendation: Extract renderItem to component, wrap with React.memo, and use useCallback for handler.

issues.description: OrderHistoryScreen renderOrder function not memoized. Causes all order cards to re-render on any state change.
issues.recommendation: Extract renderOrder to memoized component using React.memo.

issues.description: handleSubmit callback includes unstable dependencies (username, password). Callback is recreated on every keystroke, causing unnecessary re-renders of child components.
issues.recommendation: Move form submission logic to useEffect or restructure to avoid including input values in dependencies. Use ref-based approach or move handler to parent.

issues.description: Hardcoded review data and star ratings in map function causes unnecessary re-renders on every parent re-render. Should be moved to constant or memoized.
issues.recommendation: Extract hardcoded arrays to module-level constants (FEATURES, REVIEWS) to prevent object recreation.

issues.description: Multiple inline style object creations in JSX (styles.productCard, etc.). Should use StyleSheet.create() which is already used but inline combinations happen.
issues.recommendation: Verify all style props use StyleSheet-created styles, not inline objects. Consider useMemo for dynamic style combinations.

issues.description: Type assertion with 'any': (err: any) in fetchProducts catch block. Loses type safety for error handling.
issues.recommendation: Create proper error type: type ApiError = {response?: {data?: {message?: string | string[]}}} and use it instead of 'any'.

issues.description: Multiple 'any' type assertions in error handling: (err: any) appears multiple times without justification.
issues.recommendation: Define custom error type and use it throughout. Create utility function for extracting error messages.

issues.description: Type assertion 'as any' on MaterialCommunityIcons icon name. Should use proper icon type or validate at runtime.
issues.recommendation: Create type for valid icon names: type IconName = 'battery-80' | 'bluetooth' | 'water' | 'shield-check'; export const FEATURES: Array<{icon: IconName, ...}

issues.description: Magic strings for status values without type safety (e.g., 'delivered', 'shipped', 'pending'). Should be union type.
issues.recommendation: Create type: type OrderStatus = 'delivered' | 'shipped' | 'processing' | 'pending' | 'cancelled'; and export from types/index.ts

issues.description: Missing return type annotation on UserInfo interface. setUser method doesn't return Promise<void> explicitly.
issues.recommendation: Add explicit return type: setUser: (user: UserInfo) => void;

issues.description: Google Sign-in and Facebook Sign-in placeholder implementations that just set error messages. Not properly implemented but code suggests they should work, creating false expectations.
issues.recommendation: Either properly implement OAuth flows with @react-native-google-signin/google-signin and react-native-app-auth, or remove these functions and buttons entirely.

issues.description: No input validation for email format in signup beyond basic regex test. No password strength validation. No username format validation.
issues.recommendation: Create validation utilities: validateEmail(), validatePassword(), validateUsername(). Apply in onSubmit and provide specific error messages.

issues.description: Hardcoded color values scattered throughout file instead of using theme constants. Makes theming difficult and increases maintenance burden.
issues.recommendation: Import all color constants from constants/theme.ts and replace inline color strings.

issues.description: Status styling configuration scattered with hardcoded colors (DELIVERED_BG, SHIPPED_BG, etc.) instead of theme-based. Difficult to maintain a cohesive design system.
issues.recommendation: Move statusConfig and color constants to constants/theme.ts or create constants/orderStatusTheme.ts

issues.description: Hardcoded categories array (CATEGORIES) should be from API or centralized config, not hardcoded in screen.
issues.recommendation: Move CATEGORIES to constants/categories.ts or fetch from /products/categories API endpoint.

issues.description: Hardcoded review data with fake names and timestamps. Should be fetched from API or mocked properly in tests.
issues.recommendation: Create proper API endpoint /products/:id/reviews or move to mock data in __mocks__/ directory.

issues.description: Generic error logging with console.log hides actual errors. Production builds will have no visibility into failures.
issues.recommendation: Create error handling utility that logs to crash reporting service (Firebase, Sentry) in production.

issues.description: Password field shows/hides logic uses useState. No visual indicator of whether password is visible until user looks carefully.
issues.recommendation: Add icons to toggle visibility and proper styling to make toggle button more obvious.

issues.description: Payment method fetching happens with then/catch inside useEffect without proper cleanup or error boundary.
issues.recommendation: Use proper async/await in useEffect, add AbortController for cleanup, handle errors with state.

issues.description: Error messages displayed directly from API responses without sanitization. Could expose internal error details.
issues.recommendation: Create error message utility that maps API errors to user-friendly messages while logging actual errors.

issues.description: Catastrophically low test coverage. Only 5 test files exist covering: authStore, cartStore, CartScreen, LoginScreen, ScreenHeader. Missing: HomeScreen, ProductDetailScreen, OrderHistoryScreen, CheckoutScreen, ProfileScreen, ProfileEdit, Profile, Layout, all utilities, all hooks.
issues.recommendation: Implement minimum 70% unit test coverage. Priority order: 1) Screens (HomeScreen, ProductDetail, OrderHistory, Checkout, Profile) 2) Components (Profile, ProfileEdit) 3) Utils (axios interceptors, localProfileDB) 4) Store async actions

issues.description: LoginScreen test file doesn't exist. Login is critical feature and should have comprehensive tests for signup, login, validation, error handling, redirect.
issues.recommendation: Create __tests__/screens/LoginScreen.test.tsx with tests for: validation, submission, error handling, tab switching, OAuth button states.

issues.description: No integration tests for navigation flows. Can't verify: auth guard works, logged-in users can't reach login, navigation between screens works correctly.
issues.recommendation: Create __tests__/navigation/NavigationFlow.test.tsx with tests for auth-gated routes and navigation stacks.

issues.description: No tests for axios interceptor that adds auth token. Can't verify token is correctly attached to requests.
issues.recommendation: Create __tests__/utils/axios.test.ts to test request interceptor adds Bearer token.

issues.description: No tests for localProfileDB. Can't verify persistence layer works correctly, especially offline fallback logic.
issues.recommendation: Tests exist but incomplete. Expand __tests__/utils/localProfileDB.test.ts with full coverage of save/get/clear operations.

issues.description: authStore tests don't cover token expiration verification and proper cleanup on expired token.
issues.recommendation: Add test for: expired token is cleared, user is logged out on load if token expired.

issues.description: Using Zustand for state management instead of Redux Toolkit. Project instructions specify Redux Toolkit as the primary choice for global state management.
issues.recommendation: Migrate authStore and cartStore to Redux Toolkit using createSlice, createAsyncThunk pattern. Update all imports and hooks.

issues.description: Payment methods fetching and state management happens in component instead of store. Breaks separation of concerns and makes caching/error handling difficult.
issues.recommendation: Create paymentMethodsSlice in Redux with async thunk for fetching, then dispatch in component on mount.

issues.description: Error states not tracked in authStore. Login failures don't set error state, making it impossible to display error messages from failed auth attempts.
issues.recommendation: Add error field to AuthState interface. Update login/loadToken to set error on failure.

issues.description: Cart operations (addItem, updateQuantity) don't validate input or handle errors. Could silently fail if given invalid data.
issues.recommendation: Add input validation and error state. Return success/false from operations.

issues.description: setUser function doesn't check if user is already loaded before overwriting. Could cause data loss if called concurrently.
issues.recommendation: Add loading state to prevent concurrent modifications. Update setUser to be async with proper error handling.

issues.description: Token is stored with expiration check but no mechanism to refresh expired token automatically. Users forced to re-login when token expires.
issues.recommendation: Implement refresh token flow: store refresh_token separately, catch 401 errors, automatically refresh token and retry request.

issues.description: Error messages sometimes display full server error responses which could leak sensitive information about backend structure.
issues.recommendation: Create error message mapper that logs real errors but shows generic messages to user. Only show specific messages for validation errors.

issues.description: Profile data including email and full name displayed without any data masking. Could be sensitive if user is logged in on shared device.
issues.recommendation: Add privacy warning, mask email display (user@***.com), offer option to hide sensitive profile data.

issues.description: No request timeout configured. Long-running requests could hang indefinitely in poor network conditions.
issues.recommendation: Add timeout: 30000 to axios config and implement retry logic with exponential backoff.

issues.description: Navigation stack has duplicate screens: OrderHistory appears in both MainTabs and Stack navigator options. This could cause confusion in navigation flow.
issues.recommendation: Remove OrderHistory and OrderHistoryScreen from Stack.Screen options. Keep only in tabs. Use proper typing for RootStackParamList.

issues.description: inline function components for tab icons not extracted. Causes re-mount on every render due to // eslint-disable-next-line react/no-unstable-nested-components comment.
issues.recommendation: Extract tab icons to top-level component or memoized factory function.

ARCHITECTURE & STRUCTURE.description: Feature-first architecture not implemented. Current flat structure violates required organization pattern.

PERFORMANCE ISSUES.description: Missing memoization in list items, FlatList optimization issues, hardcoded data causing re-renders, unmemoized callbacks.

TYPESCRIPT ISSUES.description: Excessive use of 'any' type assertions, missing type definitions for enums, lack of error type definitions.

CODE QUALITY ISSUES.description: Hardcoded values, placeholder implementations, missing input validation, poor error handling, scattered colors.

TESTING GAPS.description: Coverage estimated <30%. Missing tests for critical screens, auth flows, and utilities.

STATE MANAGEMENT.description: Using Zustand instead of Redux Toolkit. Missing error states, no validation, state in components instead of store.

SECURITY CONCERNS.description: No token refresh mechanism, error messages leak backend info, missing request timeout, sensitive data exposure.

NAVIGATION.description: Duplicate screens in navigation, unstable nested components in tab icons.

priority_fixes.description: Reorganize entire src/ directory to feature-first. Affects all imports and project structure.
Convert Zustand stores to Redux Toolkit. Aligns with spec and enables better devtools/debugging.
Add ~80+ test files to reach 70% coverage. Priority: screens > components > utils.
Either implement Google/Facebook sign-in properly or remove placeholder code that suggests it works.
Memoize renderProduct, add keyExtractor, add getItemLayout for better scroll performance.
Auto-refresh expired tokens instead of forcing re-login.
Move hardcoded colors, categories, and configurations to centralized files.
Create proper error types and API response types instead of using 'any'.

immediate_actions: Remove Google/Facebook sign-in placeholder code or implement properly (CODE-001)
Add error state tracking to auth store so login failures can be displayed (STATE-003)
Implement FlatList keyExtractor and getItemLayout in HomeScreen (PERF-002, PERF-003)
Create proper error type instead of using 'any' everywhere (TS-001, TS-002)
short_term: Migrate from Zustand to Redux Toolkit (STATE-001)
Add memoization to all list item renders (PERF-001, PERF-004, PERF-005)
medium_term: Add barrel exports to all feature directories (ARCH-002)
Centralize theme constants and color definitions (CODE-003, CODE-004)
long_term: Add performance monitoring with React DevTools Profiler
